heading: Rules and regulations
label: 1815 Rules and regulations
notes: Promulgation of Regulations; Consultation, , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–192, § 1597 Stat. 1343Dec. 1, 1983“In promulgating any regulations to implement the amendments made by this Act [enacting sections 1804a and 1831 to 1836 of this title and amending former section 640c–1 and sections 1801 to 1803 and 1805 to 1813 of this title], the Secretary of the Interior shall consult with tribally controlled community colleges.”
amendments: Promulgation of Regulations; Consultation, , , provided that:Pub. L. 98–192, § 1597 Stat. 1343Dec. 1, 1983“In promulgating any regulations to implement the amendments made by this Act [enacting sections 1804a and 1831 to 1836 of this title and amending former section 640c–1 and sections 1801 to 1803 and 1805 to 1813 of this title], the Secretary of the Interior shall consult with tribally controlled community colleges.”

children.heading: Consultation with national Indian organizations
children.label: a Consultation with national Indian organizations
children.text: Within four months from , the Secretary shall, to the extent practicable, consult with national Indian organizations to consider and formulate appropriate rules and regulations for the conduct of the grant program established by this subchapter.October 17, 1978

children.heading: Publication
children.label: b Publication
children.text: Within six months from , the Secretary shall publish proposed rules and regulations in the Federal Register for the purpose of receiving comments from interested parties.October 17, 1978

children.heading: Promulgation
children.label: c Promulgation
children.text: Within ten months from , the Secretary shall promulgate rules and regulations for the conduct of the grant program established by this subchapter.October 17, 1978

children.heading: Source of appropriations
children.label: d Source of appropriations
children.text: Funds to carry out the purposes of this section may be drawn from general administrative appropriations to the Secretary made after .October 17, 1978
